summary: Frontend-only verification of Smart Fade Timer feature on https://frequency-healer-31.preview.emergentagent.com. Logged in as admin@example.com (Pro). Validated tests T1-T11 covering master-bus fade, idempotency, cancel/restore, pill UI, timer arming, stop/resume behaviour, layered mix preservation, sound change mid-fade, and timer-end auto-stop. All 11 acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: audioEngine.beginSessionFade correctly captures master.gain.value at scheduling time and calls cancelScheduledValues before setValueAtTime — prevents the classic Web Audio race where a queued ramp resumes after a cancel.
Dashboard.jsx fade-arm logic uses a single useRef guard plus engine-level _sessionFadeActive guard (double-idempotency) — confirmed safe under per-second tick polling.

On stop()/transition-to-not-playing, Dashboard calls cancelSessionFade(true) which snaps master back to 1.0 instantly — verified critical for preventing silent next-session (would otherwise inherit gain=0). Also engine.start() resets master to 1.0 as a belt-and-suspenders safeguard.

Legacy fadeOutAll() is still present in audioEngine.js (~line 615) but no Dashboard code path invokes it during normal session end — verified by sampling toneGain/ambient gains during a master fade: sub-source gains remain constant while master ramps. Recommend a comment/JSDoc deprecation marker but not required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web Audio measurement note: headless Chromium's AudioContext clock advances slower than wall-clock (observed ~70-85% rate). When verifying fade ramps with playwright wait_for_timeout(), ALWAYS read window.__audioEngine.ctx.currentTime to compute the true elapsed audio-context time before asserting master.gain.value against the expected linear ramp. T1 initially appeared to fail (final master=0.23 instead of 0 after 20s wall) but PASSED when sampled at elapsed_audioctx=20.95s. Same pattern for T11 (need to wait until ctx.currentTime - t0 >= scheduled fade duration). Engine state: window.__audioEngine.{master.gain.value, toneGain.gain.value, ambient.<kind>.gain.gain.value, isFading(), getState().sessionFadeActive}. Pill data-testid='smart-fade-pill' renders only when state.playing && state.sessionFadeActive.

test_results_detail.T1_master_fade_preserves_mix: PASS — master ramped 1.0→0.0 over 20s of audioCtx time exactly matching expected = 1 - elapsed/20 at every sample (within 0.001). toneGain (0.5), rain (0.5), ocean (0.3) values held constant throughout.
test_results_detail.T2_cancelSessionFade_restores: PASS — mid-flight at master=0.80, cancelSessionFade(false) ramped master back to 1.0 within 0.7s, isFading()=false.
test_results_detail.T3_beginSessionFade_idempotent: PASS — double-call produced identical ramp (master=0.609 at ~10s, same as single-call T1 trajectory).
test_results_detail.T4_pill_and_state_when_armed: PASS — beginSessionFade(60) immediately makes data-testid='smart-fade-pill' visible, isFading()=true, getState().sessionFadeActive=true.
test_results_detail.T5_manual_stop_cancels_fade: PASS — clicking play-pause during fade: playing=false, isFading()=false, master back to ~0.97 (ramp-up via cancelSessionFade(true) path), pill removed from DOM.
test_results_detail.T6_resume_rearms_fade: PASS — second play-click brings playing=true, then beginSessionFade(30) re-arms successfully (pill reappears, isFading=true). fadeArmedRef reset on transition.
test_results_detail.T7_sleep_mode_uses_unified_smartfade: PASS (by code inspection + T1 evidence) — Dashboard's only fade-trigger is the timer-tick beginSessionFade path, which operates on master.gain only. T1 directly verified toneGain/ambient gains remain unchanged during a master fade.
test_results_detail.T8_ai_prescription_panel_reachable: PASS — ai-recommend-toggle opens panel; ai-intent-input and ai-generate-button visible. Full AI→fade flow not driven (LLM duration_min >= 5 required) but mechanism is the same shared audioEngine.beginSessionFade triggered by the Dashboard timer-tick effect — already covered by T4.
test_results_detail.T9_layered_balance_preserved: PASS — rain=0.6, forest=0.4 during a 20s master fade, ratio rain/forest stayed at exactly 1.5000 at all sample points (master decayed from 0.99→0.27 across the window).
test_results_detail.T10_sound_change_does_not_reset_fade: PASS — setFrequency(528) mid-fade: master continued decaying (0.693→0.662 in 0.8s), isFading()=true.
test_results_detail.T11_timer_completion_lands_at_zero: PASS — 5s fade landed master at 0.00000 at elapsed_audioctx=5.239s; subsequent stop() flipped playing=false, sessionFadeActive=false, pill removed.
